Founding Membership

Become One of the
First 25 Founders

We intentionally kept the founding group small.

Long before there are regulars, there are founders. Fewer people means slower conversations, familiar faces, and the chance to belong before the club becomes part of the city's rhythm.

Founding membership isn't simply early access. It's an opportunity to be present while East | West becomes what it was always intended to be.

Your founding membership includes:

014 Years of
Membership

Join today, attend founder events immediately, and still receive four full years of membership once the club officially opens.

02A Seat at
the Table

Over the coming months you'll be invited to private dinners, tastings, previews, and gatherings with the other founding members as the club takes shape.

03A Lasting
Distinction

A Founding Member designation that remains with you, alongside early guest privileges and priority access to the room, the calendar, and the community.

Before there was East | West, there were two friends with a standing tee time and a habit of imagining the places they wished existed. Get to know the Founders →

The Story Behind
East | West

FAQs

The club will cap at about 250 members, 100 of them founding members — and these are the first 25 founding seats. Being in the first 25 means the best terms we'll ever offer: after these, the next founding seats come at the rate set then. Included: four years of club membership, every founding-member event, founding-member designation in perpetuity, and guest privileges from day one. Food and beverage, the pro shop, and instruction are billed separately.
You're a founding member the day you sign — in every room, at every dinner — and your four years don't start counting until the club opens. From day one, you get curated dinners, previews, collaborations, and the founder access that marks being first.
We anticipate there may be some delays. But as things stand — permitting is done and our contractors are selected — we're very confident in our ability to hit that date, or soon after. In addition, we anticipate a roll-out where some facilities will be available in the next few months.
Tell them to come meet us — we'd love to chat with them. We want to make sure the café and the way we set up the space are all there to be inviting for you and your whole family. If you have a spouse who isn't sold, please bring them to talk to us.
Some of our founding members aren't really golfers either. Golf is one of the things that pulls people into the club — but it's not the only thing. Many are coming for the sense of community, for the space and what it offers, for the programming, and for the events.
Yes — you can definitely bring guests. We're going to figure out with our founding members how that policy will work, but we want it to feel like a welcoming, inviting place — not a place where you feel stressed about how many guests you can bring.
Yes. We want to have incredible food that showcases all of Seattle. We're going to get a bakery to deliver daily, and bring in local chefs and restaurateurs to rotate through.
Families will be welcome. We want East | West Club to exist for families. We'd love to have families with kids be part of our founding members.
Yes. There is parking today on the street, and there will be an additional members' lot accessible from the alley behind the club by the time the club opens in 2027.
25 Seats. No More, No Less.

Be one of the first twenty-five, not the next two hundred.

Become a Founding Member
